{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lightcaster Heavy II
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Lightcaster Heavy II]] is a plasma pistol designed for Karoshans and [[Union]] soldiers in powered armor.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
